chunks.outputPreview: The input provides a partial code slice (Chunk 1/2) containing evidence for targeting, attack cadence, and tick-driven combat logic. Main files identified are Globals\Drones.gd and Globals\Frigates.gd for targeting priorities; entities\unit\Unit.gd and managers\player\Player_Manager.gd for core logic ticks; and Globals\utils\CombatUtils.gd for global target resolution. The slice is truncated mid-stream, so full scope verification requires raw review.

Combat tick/damage logic is governed by `Global.combat._trigger_damage` (centralized damage routing), entity-specific `_core_logic_tick` loops for targeting cadence (`drone_flat.gd`, `scanilus.gd`, `necrotilus.gd`, `bastionlus.gd`), and projectile/burst spawning within those ticks. Targeting files include `entities/drone_flat/drone_flat.gd` (mode states, target acquisition, bookkeeping), `entities/laser/Las8F38.tmp` (laser targeting cadence), and boss files for their specific attack patterns.
